name: Cycling Track UAE - Ride & Recharge at Masaar Track, Sharjah
snippet: Explore Masaar Track, a 6.6 km cycling track in Sharjah, UAE, perfect for cyclists of all levels with 24/7 access, lighting, underpasses, and a bridge. Missing: GPS coordinates 25.29 55.45

name: Masaar Track | Arada - Sharjah, UAE
snippet: 6.6 kilometre looped circuit, which runs through the woodland at on the outskirts of the Masaar master community. Featuring three underpasses and one bridge. Missing: GPS 25.29 55.45
